name: ONLY JUST MARRIED
original_name: 婚姻届に判を捺しただけですが
overview: 27-year-old Akiha Ōkado, who vows to stay single, gets a proposal to enter into a fake marriage from 30-year-old Shū Momose, who wants to get the status of a married man for some reason. Through living together as a fake couple, their relationship gradually changes.

trailers.title: [新予告]『婚姻届に判を捺しただけですが』偽りの夫婦が送る #ふいキュン 必至の偽装結婚ラブコメディ 10/19スタート!!【TBS】
